description.en: 🦞 Cross-platform unified OpenClaw gateway manager - supports macOS/Linux/Windows, auto-detect all distributions (Official/JVS/QClaw/Cloud)
description.zh: 🦞 跨平台统一 OpenClaw 网关管理器 - 支持 macOS/Linux/Windows，自动检测所有发行版

philosophy.en: Users deploy OpenClaw across multiple platforms and clouds. This tool provides unified management for all distributions through automatic configuration path detection and cross-platform service management.
philosophy.zh: 用户在多平台、多云端部署 OpenClaw。本工具通过自动检测配置路径和跨平台服务管理，统一管理所有发行版。

supports.en: Supports macOS (LaunchAgent), Linux (systemd), Windows (manual). Auto-detects OpenClaw, JVS Claw, QClaw, Cloud Claw, and custom instances.
supports.zh: 支持 macOS (LaunchAgent)、Linux (systemd)、Windows (手动)。自动检测 OpenClaw、JVS Claw、QClaw、Cloud Claw 和自定义实例。

message.en: Delete operation uses rm -rf with triple confirmation and automatic backup. Use with caution.
message.zh: 删除操作使用 rm -rf，有三重确认和自动备份。请谨慎使用。

message.en: Creates user-level services (LaunchAgent/systemd) for auto-start. Can be uninstalled anytime.
message.zh: 创建用户级服务（LaunchAgent/systemd）实现自启动。可以随时卸载。

usage.en: Run gateway-status.sh to auto-detect OS, scan all OpenClaw instances across platforms and clouds
usage.zh: 运行 gateway-status.sh 自动检测操作系统，扫描跨平台、跨云端的所有 OpenClaw 实例

zh: 🔍 自动检测所有 OpenClaw 发行版
🔒 三重确认 + 自动备份
🛡️ 用户级服务（不需要 sudo）
